nodes.author: GAISNON Mathieu, MONTOUX Julie, CARION Paul, FARASSI Yassin

nodes.label: Processus: Génération liste de courses consolidée
UI Component: Recipe Card (image + overlay + tag)
UI Component: Recipe Detail Bottom Sheet
UI Component: Dietary Preference Chips (gluten-free, lactose-free, vegan, vegetarian, nut-free, keto)
UI Component: Skill Level Selection Cards (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced)
UI Component: Profile Hero (avatar + streak counter + achievements)
UI Component: Nutritional Macro Sliders (Protein, Carbs)
UI Component: Vertical Scroll Feed (TikTok-style snap)
UI Component: Weekly Day Strip (Mon-Sun date chips)
UI Component: Shopping List Sections (Produce/Meat/Dairy with checkboxes)
UI Component: Sign In/Up Form (email, password, Apple/Google SSO)
UI Component: Create Recipe Form (cover photo, title, ingredients, steps)
UI Component: Search Bar with Recent Searches and Results Grid
UI Component: Generate List FAB (floating action button)
Design System: Material Symbols Outlined Icons
Feature: Filter Recipes (macros, allergens, difficulty, prep time)
Feature: Onboarding Flow (welcome, dietary prefs, skill level)
Feature: Authentication (Sign In/Sign Up, Apple, Google)
Feature: Nutritional Macros Display (kcal, prot, carb, fat)
Recipe Feed Screen - Main TikTok-style feed with fullscreen recipe card, nutrition info, like/save actions, bottom nav
Bottom Navigation Bar - Feed, Recipes, Menu, List, Profile tabs
Recipe Card - Summer Harvest Poke Bowl, 15min, Beginner, Protein/Carbs/Fat macros, like count 2.4k
Search Recipes Screen - Search bar, recent searches chips, grid results (124 found)
Recent Searches - Truffle Pasta, Vegan Ramen, Quick Dinner chips with clear action
Search Results Grid - 2-column grid showing Avocado Tomato, Spicy Vegan Tofu Ramen, Fresh Basil Margherita, Seared Salmon with Quinoa
Shopping List Screen - Categorized checklist (Fruits & Vegetables, Meat & Proteins, Dairy & Eggs), weekly prep summary
Weekly Prep Summary Banner - 7 recipes, 43 items for Next Week's Prep
Shopping Categories - Fruits & Vegetables, Meat & Proteins, Dairy & Eggs with add item per category
Sign Up / Login Screen - Welcome Back, email/password form, Sign In CTA, Apple/Google OAuth, Sign Up link
OAuth Providers - Apple Sign In and Google Sign In buttons
Weekly Menu Plan Screen - Calendar week strip, meal slots (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner/Snacks), Generate List CTA
Weekly Calendar Strip - October 21-25 week navigation
Generate List Button - CTA to convert weekly menu to shopping list
flutter_lldb_helper.py - LLDB debug helper for Flutter iOS RX pages breakpoint interception
flutter_export_environment.sh - Shell script exporting Flutter build environment variables for iOS
AppDelegate.swift - Flutter iOS app entry point, registers Flutter plugins
AppIcon Contents.json - iOS app icon asset catalog for iPhone and iPad sizes
LaunchImage Contents.json - iOS launch screen image asset catalog (1x/2x/3x universal)
GeneratedPluginRegistrant.h - Objective-C header declaring plugin registration interface
GeneratedPluginRegistrant.m - Registers flutter_secure_storage, path_provider_foundation, sqflite, sqlite3_flutter_libs plugins
sqflite_darwin iOS plugin - SQLite database support
sqlite3_flutter_libs iOS plugin - SQLite3 native library
Runner-Bridging-Header.h - Swift/ObjC bridging header importing GeneratedPluginRegistrant
RunnerTests.swift - XCTest suite for iOS Runner app (placeholder)
Concept: Bottom Navigation - 5-tab navigation pattern (Feed, Recipes, Menu, List, Profile) shared across screens
Concept: CookScroll App - Flutter-based mobile cooking app with recipe feed, search, weekly menu planning, shopping list, auth
Concept: Weekly Menu to Shopping List Flow - Generate List action converts meal plan into categorized shopping list
Onboarding Flow (3-step: Welcome -> Dietary -> Skill -> Feed)
GoRouter shell route pattern (MainScaffold wraps child)

hyperedges.label: Core MVP Features: scroll, save, shopping list, weekly menu, auth, offline
Flutter Tech Stack: riverpod + go_router + drift + dio + secure_storage
Culinary Flow Design System: colors, typography, layout applied in mockups
Specification Documents Triad: CDC + SFG + SFD
Shopping List DB Pipeline: weekly_menus -> menu_entries -> recipe_ingredients -> shopping_list
Onboarding Flow: Welcome -> Dietary Preferences -> Skill Level
MVP Core Features: Scroll, Filter, Save, Menu, Shopping List
Shared Design System (Tailwind, Montserrat/Inter, Material Icons, Primary #ae2f34)
All Screens share Bottom Navigation Bar
User Stories by Persona: Karenn (meal planning) and Antoine (gamification/scroll)
All main screens share Bottom Navigation Bar with 5 tabs
iOS Flutter plugin set: flutter_secure_storage, path_provider, sqflite, sqlite3_flutter_libs
CookScroll UI Mockup Screens - all 5 main app screens
Onboarding 3-screen flow: Welcome -> Dietary -> Skill -> /feed
OnboardingDietaryScreen + OnboardingSkillScreen share state via onboardingNotifierProvider
All auth screens reference AppColors for consistent theming
appRouter registers all onboarding + auth screens as GoRoute entries
App entry wiring: main() → ProviderScope → CookScrollApp → appRouterProvider → MaterialApp.router
MainScaffold bottom nav connects 5 routes to feature screens
All feature screens are placeholders ('coming soon') except RecipeDetailScreen which accepts recipeId param
Shared widgets (DotsIndicator, MainScaffold) both consume AppColors from core/theme
